style='font-size:18px; '  itemprop="text" ><p style="text-align: center;">Stop in and enjoy the beautiful weather outside on our beautiful double decker patio!</p><p style="text-align: center;">Whether you’re visiting Buffalo, the city of Good Neighbors, for the first time and looking for fun things to do, need somewhere to take the family for a day, seeking adventure with friends/family or looking for a unique date night idea, Buffalo RiverWorks has it all!</p><p style="text-align: center;">Our massive, 60,000 square foot indoor/outdoor event center continues to grow, offering everything from:</p><p style="text-align: center;">🦬 <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/things-to-do/summer-fall/">Sports & Adventure</a></p><p style="text-align: center;">🦬 <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/events/photo/">Entertainment</a></p><p style="text-align: center;">🦬 <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/food-drink/the-ward-restaurant/">Food & Drinks</a></p><p style="text-align: center;">🦬 <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/food-drink/riverworks-brewing-co/">RiverWorks Brewing Company</a></p><p style="text-align: center;">🦬 <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/about/">History</a></p><p style="text-align: center;">And so much more. All in one amazing place!</p><p style="text-align: center;">With the newest addition of the <a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/things-to-do/summer-fall/riverland-rides/">Buffal-“O” Ferris Wheel, Jawz Drop & Riverland amusement park</a>, you can now see & experience Buffalo, NY in a new and exciting way!</p><p style="text-align: center;">We are open all year and offer everything you need for a fun and adventurous day with family and friends!</p><p style="text-align: center;"><strong><span style="text-decoration: underline;">HOURS</span>:</strong></p><p style="text-align: center;"><strong><a center;"><strong><a href="https://buffaloriverworks.com/things-to-do/summer-fall/riverland-rides/">Ferris Wheel & Jawz Drop</a>:<br /> </strong>Mon–Fri: 1pm–8pm<br /> Sat–Sun: 12pm–8pm<br />
